title: LegenVD
description:
Magic the Gathering strategy videos with a focus on the digital Magic Arena.
This channel is supported by its fans on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

videos.title: Blowing up the competition.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a red/white enter the battlefield deck, featuring The Jolly Balloon Man from Duskmourn as commander in Brawl.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

00:00 - Intro
01:55 - Deck Tech
10:04 - vs Tezzeret, Master of the Bridge
19:49 - vs Edgar, Charmed Groom
29:16 - vs Ajani, Nacatl Pariah
39:50 - vs Freyalise, Skyshroud Partisan
44:57 - vs Rocco, Street Chef
49:55 - vs Slimefoot and Squee
54:43 - vs Kona, Rescue Beastie
58:29 - vs Amalia Benavides Aguirre
1:01:55 - vs Helga, Skittish Seer

Decklist: 
https://aetherhub.com/Deck/the-jolly-balloon-man-brawl
